content: TASK-041 interrupt done: subgraph/zone/boundary area overlays now share a render-time packing pass when multiple area overlay kinds are active, preventing visual region overlap. Packing is run from the normal render snapshot, so abstraction collapse/reopen recalculates the effective model, layout, and area positions. Targeted render tests pass; built dist demo seed checks report overlaps=[] for all area overlays and for collapsed zone:gcp. Next: continue TASK-009/TASK-010 acceptance work; consider 3D full icon-grid parity and subgraph overlay parity in 3D if the human asks. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
